pi_items.source: task.json description and export_result.sh expected file paths
task.json description and export_result.sh expected file paths
verifier.py checks result.get('csv_rows', 0) >= 12 and task.json description
verifier.py comment 'Must be <= 0.05s' and allows up to 0.06s in code
verifier.py comment '<= 3 frames' and allows up to 4 frames in code

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a PsychoPy experiment saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/masked_priming/masked_priming.psyexp and a conditions CSV file at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/masked_priming/stimuli.csv. The CSV file must contain at least 12 rows of data. The experiment's prime duration must be strictly short, with an expected maximum of 0.05 seconds or 3 frames, enforced by the verifier.
